channel.title: Nutrient Flow
channel.description: Fresh takes for indoor hydroponic growers.

item.title: "grow lights for greens" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about grow lights for greens through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: The state of Systems in 2026
item.description: A field report on systems: where things stand, and what indoor hydroponic growers should do next.

item.title: Starter guide: Nutrients without the overwhelm
item.description: A practical on-ramp to nutrients for indoor hydroponic growers — one repeatable workflow, no gear debt.

item.title: "kratky method guide" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "kratky method guide" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why indoor hydroponic growers are rethinking Lighting
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how indoor hydroponic growers approach lighting — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Leafy Greens on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in leafy greens — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Nutrients: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping nutrients for indoor hydroponic growers.
